    • bupt.ta.ai中Job的使用

      参数类型为Job的bupt.ta.ai中的方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      java.util.List<java.lang.String> AIMatchService.getMissingSkills(TAProfile profile, Job job) 
      AIMatchService.MatchResult AIMatchService.matchSkills(TAProfile profile, Job job) 

    • bupt.ta.llm中Job的使用

      参数类型为Job的bupt.ta.llm中的方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      java.lang.String LlmMatchInsightService.buildInsight(TAProfile profile, Job job, AIMatchService.MatchResult match) 
      java.lang.String LlmMatchInsightService.buildInsightStream(TAProfile profile, Job job, AIMatchService.MatchResult match, java.util.function.Consumer<java.lang.String> onChunk)
      Streaming counterpart of LlmMatchInsightService.buildInsight(bupt.ta.model.TAProfile, bupt.ta.model.Job, bupt.ta.ai.AIMatchService.MatchResult).
      java.util.List<java.lang.String> LlmApplicantSummaryService.buildSummaryLines(TAProfile profile, Job job, AIMatchService.MatchResult match, int currentWorkload, boolean workloadBalanced)
      Returns 5–8 concise bullet lines for MO review cards.
      java.lang.String LlmApplicantSummaryService.buildSummaryStream(TAProfile profile, Job job, AIMatchService.MatchResult match, int currentWorkload, boolean workloadBalanced, java.util.function.Consumer<java.lang.String> onChunk)
      Streaming counterpart of LlmApplicantSummaryService.buildSummaryLines(bupt.ta.model.TAProfile, bupt.ta.model.Job, bupt.ta.ai.AIMatchService.MatchResult, int, boolean).

    • bupt.ta.service中Job的使用

      返回Job的bupt.ta.service中的方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      Job AdminService.AdminApplicationRow.getJob() 
      Job AdminService.MOJobDetailRow.getJob() 
      返回变量类型为Job的类型的bupt.ta.service中的方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      java.util.List<Job> AdminService.TADetailReport.getSavedJobs() 
      参数类型为Job的bupt.ta.service中的方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      static void StudentNotificationService.notifyApplicationSubmitted(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job)
      Notifies the applicant that an application was submitted.
      static void StudentNotificationService.notifyAutoClosed(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job, java.lang.String note)
      Notifies the applicant that a pending application was auto-closed (workload cap).
      static void StudentNotificationService.notifyAutoPromotedFromWaitlist(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job)
      Notifies the applicant that they were promoted from the waitlist to selected.
      static void StudentNotificationService.notifyInterviewDetails(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job)
      Notifies the applicant of interview time, location, and assessment notes.
      static void StudentNotificationService.notifyInterviewInvite(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job)
      Notifies the applicant that their application moved to the interview stage.
      static void StudentNotificationService.notifyRejected(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job, java.lang.String moNotes)
      Notifies the applicant that they were not selected.
      static void StudentNotificationService.notifySelected(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job)
      Notifies the applicant that they were selected for the role.
      static void StudentNotificationService.notifyWaitlist(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job)
      Notifies the applicant that they are on the waitlist.
      static void StudentNotificationService.notifyWithdrawn(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job)
      Notifies the applicant that they withdrew an application.
      void ApplicationTimelineService.record(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job, java.lang.String actorUserId, java.lang.String actorName, java.lang.String actorRole, java.lang.String eventType, java.lang.String title, java.lang.String detail, java.lang.String fromStatus, java.lang.String toStatus)
      Appends one timeline event for an application.
      void ApplicationTimelineService.recordStatusChange(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job, java.lang.String actorUserId, java.lang.String actorName, java.lang.String actorRole, java.lang.String fromStatus, java.lang.String toStatus, java.lang.String detail)
      Records a ApplicationTimelineService.TYPE_STATUS_CHANGED timeline event.
      boolean AdminService.wouldExceedWorkloadLimitOnSelect(DataStorage storage, java.lang.String applicantId, Job job, AdminSettings settings)
      Returns true when selecting this applicant for job would meet or exceed the admin workload cap.
      参数类型为Job的bupt.ta.service中的构造器 
      构造器和说明
      AdminApplicationRow(Application application, Job job) 
      MOJobDetailRow(Job job, int totalApplications, int pendingCount, int interviewCount, int waitlistCount, int selectedCount, int rejectedCount, int withdrawnCount, int autoClosedCount, boolean atOrOverCapacity, boolean overCapacity, boolean inactiveWithActiveApplications) 
      类型变量类型为Job的bupt.ta.service中的构造器参数 
      构造器和说明
      TADetailReport(User user, TAProfile profile, java.util.List<AdminService.AdminApplicationRow> applicationRows, java.util.List<Job> savedJobs, java.util.List<SiteNotification> notifications, int selectedCount, int pendingCount, int interviewCount, int waitlistCount, int rejectedCount, int autoClosedCount, int withdrawnCount)

      返回Job的bupt.ta.storage中的方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      Job DataStorage.addJob(Job job)
      Assigns a new id and appends an OPEN job.
      Job DataStorage.getJobById(java.lang.String id)
      Returns a job by id, or null.

      限定符和类型 方法和说明

      Loads all job postings from jobs.json.

      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      Job DataStorage.addJob(Job job)
      Assigns a new id and appends an OPEN job.
      void DataStorage.saveJob(Job job)
      Inserts or replaces a job by id.

      参数类型为Job的bupt.ta.util中的方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      static void WorkArrangementSupport.applyDerivedFields(Job job, java.util.List<WorkArrangementItem> items)
      Sets setTaSlots(int), setWorkArrangements(java.util.List<bupt.ta.model.WorkArrangementItem>), workingHours, workload, taAllocationPlan from items.
      static java.lang.String InterviewCalendarSupport.buildCalendarFile(Application application, Job job) 
      static java.lang.String InterviewCalendarSupport.buildFilename(Application application, Job job) 
      static boolean JobActivity.closeOpenJobIfDeadlinePassed(Job job)
      If the job is still OPEN but the deadline has passed, set status to CLOSED (call before persisting).
      static double JobWorkloadEstimator.estimatedHoursPerSelectedTa(Job job) 
      static boolean JobSelectionCapacity.hasVacancy(Job job, java.util.List<Application> apps, java.lang.String excludeApplicationId)

      static boolean JobActivity.isInactive(Job job) 
      static java.lang.String JobActivity.listPathFor(Job job)
